name: backlink-panel
description: Universal cross-blueprint backlink renderer. BacklinkPanel.render(dv, opts) — reverse-queries the 6 canonical cross-ref keys (people:/projects:/teams:/products:/trips:/meetings:) and renders matching notes via customJS.BeaconCards. One Dataview query template parameterized by entityType. Materialized on Person/Project/Team/Product/Trip atlas pages from FA-8 payoff cycle (v0.61.0).
